citation.description: Lines 342-350: import KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES (line 49) and the guard `if event.get('event_type') not in KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES: return []` (line 349-350) skips reducer-ignored sidecars. Test coverage at tests/unit/test_identity_gate_scope_and_ledger.py lines 106-141.

criteria.criterion: `verify_authorship._event_from_file` skips events whose `event_type` is not in `reducer.KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES` (reducer-ignored sidecars), proven by a test where a `COMPLETION_VERDICT` on a work ticket is NOT an enforced failure while a KNOWN unsigned `STATUS`/`CREATE` still IS.

citation.description: Lines 518-521: `if ev.event is None and ev.commit_sha is None and ev.position: ev.commit_sha = authorship.resolve_position_commit(ev.position, tracker, repo_root=args.root)`. Test at test_identity_gate_scope_and_ledger.py lines 175-219.

criteria.criterion: The gate re-resolves a LEDGER entry whose recorded `commit_sha` is null via `authorship.resolve_position_commit(position, tracker)` before the era/enforcement decision, proven by a test that a null-commit, era-valid signed ledger entry classifies `verified` not `key_not_valid_at_era`.

citation.description: Lines 113-122: after `resolve_event_commit` returns None, falls back to `authorship.resolve_position_commit(position_str, tracker, repo_root=repo_root)`. Monkeypatched unit tests at test_identity_gate_scope_and_ledger.py lines 223-261 and 263-288.

criteria.criterion: `compact._build_authorship_ledger` never persists `commit_sha: null` when the position is resolvable — it falls back to `resolve_position_commit`; proven by a monkeypatched unit test.

citation.description: File exists with 5 regression tests covering both bug classes: sidecar scope exclusion (2 tests), null-commit ledger re-resolution (1 test), compaction fallback (1 test), and fallback-only-when-both-fail (1 test). Lint/suite-pass is a CI runtime outcome; the test file is non-stub, real implementation.

criteria.criterion: Regression tests added under `tests/unit/` and the full suite passes; `make lint` clean.

citation.description: The `verify-identity` job (lines 441-503) is present in gerrit-verify.yaml and wired into the `vote` job's `needs` at line 512. Operator attestation in ticket comment names Gerrit change 772 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/772) as the landed change, with specific detail about wiring into the Verified vote.

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] `verify-identity` is added as a pre-merge job in the Gerrit `Verified` gate (`.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml`) so the whole-store enforcement check runs BEFORE merge, not only post-merge.
